notes: Trace Parquet merge now treats locked Trace_Master.parquet as pending finalization instead of a failed merge.
Validated Trace_Master_tmp parquet files are preserved and tracked by Trace_Master_pending_switch.json.
Retry Finalization button added for completing the file switch after Power BI, File Explorer, or sync locks are released.
Pending finalization validates file existence, canonical schema, row count, optional ledger file, and file timestamp before switching.
Trace business logic, schema normalization, dashboard logic, AS400, and TraceCollector are unchanged.
